license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8abhsan
title: Hi-Fi Gibson Assembly
author: NUS iGEM

steps_raw.instruction: Calculate for volumes of respective fragments to assemble based on their length and concentration
Add calculated volume of each fragment (maximum volume: 5 µL )
Add in 5 µL of 2x Hi-Fi DNA Assembly Master Mix into the PCR tube NEBuilder HiFi DNA Assembly Master Mix - 10 rxns New England Biolabs Catalog #E2621S
